resolution: Bug removed - targets .claude/commands/*.md files which cannot be edited per system restrictions
title: Lack of Input Validation in Feature Requests
description: Feature requests are not adequately validated against the schema before being processed, which could lead to malformed data being saved.

root_cause_potential: Missing schema validation in feature request processing
Insufficient error handling for malformed requests
technical_analysis.suggested_solution: Implement strict validation checks using the provided schema before saving any feature requests

immediate_fixes.action: Add JSON schema validation for all incoming feature requests
immediate_fixes.rationale: Ensure data integrity and prevent malformed data storage

immediate_fixes.action: Implement input sanitization and type checking
immediate_fixes.rationale: Prevent injection attacks and data corruption

immediate_fixes.action: Add comprehensive error reporting for validation failures
immediate_fixes.rationale: Provide clear feedback to users about validation issues

impact_assessment.user_impact: Medium - Potential data corruption and system instability
impact_assessment.functionality_impact: Medium - Feature request system reliability affected
impact_assessment.urgency: Medium - Should be addressed in current development cycle
